VCL to FMX Component Mapping Reference

Generated from the current VCL2FMXConverter v5.0 mapping reference data

Version 5.0 Vanguard

Revision date: June 27, 2026

Scope: standard VCL classes currently modeled in the converter, their FMX counterparts when known, and the current property/event mapping rows exposed by the live mapper. This document reflects the current v5.0 mapping surface. The 22 JSON mapping packs were compared against the released v4.1.8 set and are unchanged for v5.0.

Source mode: built-in mapper-source fallback. The class/property/event rows were reconstructed from the current mapper source because explicit matrix JSON artifacts were not present in the expected build directories.
